SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-11-2017 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-11-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-11-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS MICHAEL ROGERS, GINSU YOON AND JEFF HANDWERGERE WERE PRESENT AND ALL THREE WAIVE SERVICE. AMIR MORTAZAVI WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
